sections.sectionTitle: Pasian' Hehpihna Tawh Suahtak Ding Lametna

verses.text: Pasian in gim hong piakna zia a thuakkhinpa kei ka hi hi
Amah in a thuk mahmah khuamial sungah a hong hawlkhia hi
Hong hehpih hetloin a khut tawh a hong tum niloh hi
Amah in a liam a bai guh kitansa-in a hong nusia hi
Amah in lunggimna leh gentheihna thonginn sungah a hong khumcip hi
Amah in sihna khuamial uih sungah a teng dingin aana tawh thu a hong pia hi
Amah in kol hong bulh a, taikhiatzawh hetlohna kulhpi sungah hong koih hi
Hong huh un, ci-in ka kiko hangin ka kikona aw a pualamah a kizazo kei hi
Hoi dangdang ka hih manin suang kulhpite ka kantanzo kei hi
Amah in vompi bangin kei hong buksim a, humpinelkai bangin a hong bawh hi
Amah in lam pamah hong delhkhia a, a hong balnen khit ciangin a hong nusia hi
Amah in a thalpi kek a, thal tawh kap dingin a hong ngim hi
Amah in a thaltang a thuktum theithei dingin a hong kap hi
Mite in sun tawntung hong nuihsan niloh uh a, leitung bup in ciamnuihna-in a hong nei uh hi
Amah in ka ut lohpipi-in tuikha hong dawnsak a, ka duh lohpipi-in an kha a hong nesak hi
Amah in ka maitang lei-ah hong hiat a, suang tungah ka ha a hong tahtansak hi
Lungnopna, cidamna, kipahna cihte bang ahi hiam, cih mel ka thei nawn kei hi
Sauveipi ka nungta nawn kei ding hi. Topa ' tung pan ka lametna teng a beita hi
Gimna ka thuaknate leh innlelo neiloin ka omna pen gu-kha bang hi a
tua pen a tawntungin lungkiatna ahi hi
Ahi zongin ka phawk giugiau thu khat in lametna khat hong nei theisak hi
A bei theilo Topa ' hong itna leh a hehpihna a kizom paisuak hi a
zing nisuak bangin thaksuak tawntung a, ni a hong suah pelmawh mah tawh a kibang ahi hi
Topa longal neihdang neilo ka hih manin ama tung bekah lametna ka nei hi
Amah a muangte-a' dingin Topa a hoih hi
Tua ahih ciangin thuakzawhna tawh ngak kenkanzo lehang a hoihpen ahi hi. A hong hotkhiat ding amah ngak ni
Na khangno lai-in thuakzawh hat ding kisin leteh hoihpen hi
Gimna i thuak ciangin damtakin tu hithiatin i thuakzo ding hi
Lametna ding om thei lai ahih manin phunphun huai deklo hi
Guallelin bawlsiatna thuak ta lehang tua banga om lel ding ahi hi
Topa in hehpihna nei ahih manin hong nial paisuaklo ding hi
Dahna hong thuaksak thei ding a, ahih hangin eite a hong itna muan'huai-in kip tawntung hi
Dahna leh gimna a hong thuaksak ciangin amah lungdampah samlo hi
Topa in thong sungah i thuak i lunggimnate a hong thei hi
Mite in Pasian thusim loin, i hamphatnate hong paihkhiat sakin
zum thukhenna-ah a manin thu a kikhen loh ciangin, amah in a hong thei veve hi
Topa' deihna bang bekin na khempeuh a piang ahi hi
Ama thupiakna bangin a sia ahi a, a pha ahi zongin a piang ahi hi
I mawhna hangin gim i thuak ciangin bang hangin phunphun ding ihi hiam
I gamtatnasate limtakin ki-enpha kikin Topa ' lamah kiheikik ni
Vantunga om Pasian tungah i lungsim pia-in thu ngen ni
“ Topa aw, nang tungah kong khial uh a, hong lehdokha ka hih manun ka mawhna uh na hong maisak nai kei hi
“Kote nong nungdelh a, na hong that khinzo hi. Heh na hih manin na hehpihna a kiseelcip hi
Na hehna, meiipi zahin sah mahmah ahih manin ka thungetna uh na kiang a hong tungzo kei hi
Hih leitungah kote a kihhuai nahteh muat bangin na hong bawl hi
“Ka galte khempeuh un hong simmawhin a hong zahpih uh hi
Siatna bekbek tawh kidimin, kihtakna leh launa tawh ka nungta uh hi
Ka mite a kisiat manin ka khitui hawktui luang a bang hi
“Ka khitui kang theiloin luitui bangin luang tawntung a
vantung panin Topa in hong ensukin a hong muh ciangin
ka khuapi kisiatna in ka lungsim hong kitamsak hi
“A thu omlopi-in ka galte in hong mudah uh a, vasa siah bangin thang a hong siah uh hi
Leihawm thukpi kawt sungah hong hing khiat uh a, suangtumpi tawh a hong sincip uh hi
Tui in hong tumcip gawp ahih manin a si khinta-in ka kingaihsun hi
“ Topa aw, leihawm thukpi taw panin ka hong kikoto hi
Kong thumna hong ngai in, ci-in ka hong thum ciangin na hong za hi
Na hong dawng a, a laulo dingin thu nong pia hi
“Topa aw, nangmah in na hong huh a, na hong nungtasak hi
A mawkna-in kei hong kimawhsaknate thei khin na hih ciangin thu hong khen in la, kei hong khahkhia in
Ka galte' hong muhdahna leh a vaihawm simna thute uh na thei khinzo hi
“ Topa aw, amau' hong simmawhnate na thei khinzo a, a ngimnate khempeuh uh zong na theizo hi
Sun tawntung keimah bawlsiat ding bekbek kikumin a vaihawm tawntung uh hi
Zingsanga kipan nitak dong a hong zahpih uh hi
“ Topa aw, amau' gamtatna bangin thukkik in
Amaute phuisam in la, a cimawh dingin hawlkhia in
Amaute delhkek in la, leitung panin nuaimang gawp in,” ci ni.
